nav.wrongNetwork: Your wallet is on the wrong network. Switch to {name} (Chain ID {chainId}) to use this app.

landing.heroSubtitle: Trustless P2P escrow for traders, freelancers, and DAO contractors — enforced by smart contracts and AI arbitration.
landing.welcomeSubtitle: Connect your wallet and create a secure escrow in under a minute.
landing.createNewEscrowDesc: Start a simple or milestone escrow in seconds
landing.viewExistingDesc: Open your dashboard to manage active escrows
landing.feature1Desc: Lock funds for any P2P deal. Released only when you confirm delivery — or an arbiter resolves the dispute.
landing.feature2Desc: Break large projects into phases. Release each milestone independently as work is delivered and verified.
landing.feature3Desc: AI reviews evidence from both parties and issues a binding on-chain ruling in minutes. No lawyers, no delays.
landing.howWorksDesc: Learn how to use escrows with anyone worldwide. See how roles work, how funds move, and how disputes are resolved — all on-chain.
landing.aiSubtitle: Select AI Arbiter when creating an escrow. Both parties have 48 hours to submit evidence — our AI oracle reviews it and executes the ruling on-chain automatically.
landing.aiStep1Desc: Either party marks the escrow as disputed. Both sides are notified immediately.
landing.aiStep2Desc: Both parties submit evidence — text, screenshots, or file links — directly on-chain.
landing.aiStep3Desc: Our oracle fetches all evidence and sends it to an AI model for impartial analysis.
landing.aiStep4Desc: The AI ruling is signed and executed on-chain. Funds released or refunded within minutes.
landing.aiPricingDesc: 0.5% protocol fee on all escrows · +0.001 ETH flat fee when AI Arbiter is selected
landing.footer: Built on Base · Verified on Basescan ·
landing.why1: No custody — funds locked in contract
landing.why2: No accounts — just connect and go
landing.heroQuote: Safer than trust. Simpler than multisig.

create.title: Create Escrow
create.subtitle: Deploy a new escrow contract on Base
create.networkBanner: Base Mainnet. Connect your wallet to Base (Chain ID: 8453, RPC: https://mainnet.base.org) before deploying.
create.simpleEscrowDesc: Single-release. Funds released on delivery or arbiter decision.
create.aiArbiterEnabledDesc: Disputes are resolved automatically by an AI oracle. Both parties submit evidence on-chain; the AI reviews and executes the decision.
create.aiArbiterNotDeployed: ⚠ AI Arbiter contract not yet deployed — set NEXT_PUBLIC_AI_ARBITER_ADDRESS in .env
create.confirmTimeout: Confirmation timed out. Tx: {hash}… — check your dashboard in a moment.
create.noAddressParsed: Receipt received but couldn't parse escrow address. Check the dashboard.

home.title: EscrowHubs — Trustless Escrow on BlockDAG
home.description: Create secure, trustless escrow agreements powered by BlockDAG. Simple escrow, milestone payments, and AI-powered dispute resolution. 0.5% fees.

meta.description: Create secure, trustless escrow agreements on Base. Simple escrow, milestone payments, and AI-powered dispute resolution. 0.5% fees.

security.title: Security & Trust
security.subtitle: How EscrowHubs protects your assets on Base
security.sc1: 100% on-chain escrow logic — no custodial wallets, no middlemen
security.sc2: Immutable smart contracts deployed on Base (Chain ID 1404)
security.sc3: All escrow funds are held by the contract, not by EscrowHubs
security.p1: Funds are locked in the smart contract until both parties agree or the AI Arbiter resolves a dispute
security.p2: No single party — including EscrowHubs — can withdraw funds unilaterally
security.p3: All transactions are publicly verifiable on the Base explorer
security.ai1: The AI Arbiter evaluates disputes based on evidence submitted by both parties
security.ai2: All arbiter decisions are recorded on-chain and auditable
security.ai3: The arbiter cannot access or move funds — it only signals the contract to release
security.pl2: No private keys stored on our servers
security.pl3: Open source — verify our code on GitHub
security.au2: We are committed to third-party security audits and will publish results here
security.au3: If you discover a vulnerability, contact us at security@escrowhubs.io
security.ctaTitle: Ready to create a secure escrow?
security.metaDesc: Learn how EscrowHubs protects your assets with on-chain escrow logic, immutable smart contracts, and AI-powered dispute resolution on Base.

tour.step1Body: Secure P2P escrow enforced by smart contracts. No accounts, no custody, no middlemen. Let us show you around — takes 30 seconds.
tour.step2Body: Connect any EVM wallet to get started. No account or sign-up needed — your wallet is your identity.
tour.step3Body: Simple escrow for one-off deals. Milestone escrow for staged payments. Both include optional AI dispute resolution.
tour.step4Body: Set the amount, enter the beneficiary address, and deploy. Share the link — they connect and the contract recognizes their role automatically.
tour.step5Body: 100% on-chain. Neither party can move funds unilaterally. Disputes resolved by AI arbiter — not promises, not lawyers.

escrowDetail.shareDesc: Send this link to your counterparty so they can view and interact with this escrow.
